trusts.name: Gloucestershire Hospitals NHS Foundation Trust
trusts.notes: Original trust. data_dir is the repo root so QR codes issued before multi-trust support keep working. The services tree is scraped separately by scrape_services.py (quarterly, manual).

credits.clinical_lead: Dr Tom Mitchell, Consultant in Emergency Medicine & Clinical Medical Information Officer

trusts.name: Worcestershire Acute Hospitals NHS Trust
trusts.notes: HTML leaflet pages, all listed on one index (~727). Avoid the trust's alternate /documents/patient-information-leaflets-a-z/ page — it renders client-side.
trusts.listed_note: Not yet discussed with the trust — preview/demo only. Set listed: true once the trust has agreed.

trusts.name: Torbay and South Devon NHS Foundation Trust
trusts.notes: PDF leaflets (~730) on a single A-Z page. URLs carry ?last-updated=YYYYMMDD, so a leaflet revision shows up in the change log as a 'Moved' entry. Slugs derive from titles (filenames are just numbers).
trusts.listed_note: Not yet discussed with the trust — preview/demo only. Set listed: true once the trust has agreed.

trusts.name: North Cumbria Integrated Care NHS Foundation Trust
trusts.notes: Cumberland Infirmary Carlisle + West Cumberland Hospital Whitehaven. ~324 HTML leaflets on one index page (concrete5, server-rendered). Slugs are mixed-case — never lowercase them. The trust also uses EIDO for extra leaflets, which are not on the website and can't be scraped.
trusts.listed_note: Not yet discussed with the trust — preview/demo only. Set listed: true once the trust has agreed.

trusts.name: Royal Surrey NHS Foundation Trust
trusts.notes: CFML media browser: ~83 specialty folders, paginated ~10 items/page, server-rendered. Items open the trust's leaflet viewer page (PDF inside). The flat 'show all' view returns nothing — the folder tree must be walked, so a scan takes a few minutes.
trusts.listed_note: Not yet discussed with the trust — preview/demo only. Set listed: true once the trust has agreed.

not_scrapeable.name: Royal United Hospitals Bath
not_scrapeable.reason: No central index — leaflet PDFs scattered across per-department .asp pages (would need a hardcoded department list). Checked 2026-07-05.

not_scrapeable.name: North Bristol NHS Trust
not_scrapeable.reason: No central index — HTML leaflets live under each service's own hub page (would need a two-level crawl of the A-Z of services). Checked 2026-07-05.

not_scrapeable.name: Great Western Hospitals (Swindon)
not_scrapeable.reason: Leaflet A-Z removed in the trust's 2026 site rebuild; search-engine links are stale 404s. Checked 2026-07-05.

not_scrapeable.name: University Hospitals Bristol and Weston
not_scrapeable.reason: No on-site leaflet library; the historical foi.avon.nhs.uk archive is dead. Checked 2026-07-05.

not_scrapeable.name: Somerset NHS Foundation Trust
not_scrapeable.reason: No index of any kind — PDFs scattered across ~200 WordPress microsites. Checked 2026-07-05.
